channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: AI Blast Radius Analyzer - Mon Mar 16 17:06:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
Analyzes the "blast radius" of code changes in real-time. Shows how many files, classes, and downstream dependencies are affected when you modify a class. Displays...
vendor: SuryatejaGajjela downloads: 11 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.blastradius.plugin

item.title: DuckDB Grammar Support - Tue Mar 17 11:48:50 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides IDE support for DuckDB PEG grammar files (.gram): Syntax highlighting Go to Definition and Find Usages for grammar rules Navigation between grammar rules and...
vendor: Dtenwolde downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.duckdb.gram

item.title: Unicode Search - Sun Mar 15 11:02:07 UTC 2026
item.description:
Search and insert Unicode characters. This tool window plugin helps you quickly find, copy, and insert Unicode characters and symbols directly into your editor. Key...
vendor: Chalda downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: it.chalda.unicodesearch

item.title: Terminal Bridge - Fri Mar 13 17:40:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
Expose your IntelliJ IDE terminals through a local REST API and WebSocket server, enabling programmatic terminal control from external tools. Features REST API — List...
vendor: LLITD LLC downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREEMIUM xmlId: com.llitd.terminalbridge

item.title: AdpTopViewer - Sat Mar 14 15:04:39 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Pingia downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.pingia.AdbTopViewer

item.title: OpenAI Usage Quota - Mon Mar 16 15:07:27 UTC 2026

vendor: Moritzf downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.moritzf.openai-usage-quota

item.title: Basic Compose Activity - Sat Mar 14 11:38:53 UTC 2026

vendor: DrCode downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.drjacky.basiccomposeactivityplugin

item.title: Plot Toggle - Sat Mar 14 17:48:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds a toolbar toggle button to control PyCharm's Show plots in tool window setting (Settings > Tools > Python Plots) without opening the settings dialog.
vendor: RootML downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.plottoggle.pycharm-plot-toggle

item.title: icns - Mon Mar 02 09:43:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
